description_long: This is a rustic, wooden cup with an octagonal body, reminiscent of a medieval tankard. The cup is constructed from dark brown wooden staves, bound together by two black metal bands encircling its upper and lower sections. A sturdy, angular black handle is attached to one side, providing a secure grip. The front and back faces of the cup feature a simple green circular emblem with a cross pattern, adding a decorative touch. The interior appears hollow, suitable for holding liquids, and the overall design suggests durability and a handcrafted aesthetic.
description: A dark wooden, octagonal cup with black metal bands, a sturdy black handle, and a green circular emblem on its sides.
description_view_0: The cup is shown from the front, highlighting the handle on the right and the green emblem on the wooden body.
description_view_1: The cup is viewed directly from the back, with the black handle centered and no emblem visible.
description_view_2: The cup is seen from the opposite side of the handle, showing the left side of the handle and the green emblem on the wooden body.
description_view_3: The cup is viewed from the side opposite the handle, showing only the wooden staves and metal bands, with no handle or emblem visible.
